title: Optimize a Chatbot Response
scenario: Write a chatbot response to a customer's query about the return policy, ensuring it is clear, concise, and friendly. The response should include specific details about the return window and any additional instructions.
constraints: Must include specific details about the return window

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the response is clear and easy to understand.
Evaluate the tone of the response to ensure it is friendly and empathetic.
Assess if the response includes accurate and up-to-date information about the return policy.
